summary: Completed testing of Agnost AI SDK integration in Nagarik Sahayak app. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Agnost tracking is active for search_schemes, eligibility_matcher, and generate_pdf tool calls.
passed_tests: POST /api/search-schemes with query 'farmer' returns PM-KISAN scheme with match_found: true
POST /api/search-schemes returns MCP tool metadata (tool_name, tool_input, documents_scanned)
POST /api/eligibility-check with profile data returns eligibility results
POST /api/generate-pdf with profile creates PDF and returns download URL
GET /api/pdf/{id} serves generated PDF with application/pdf content-type
Agnost tracking logs show session creation on API calls
Frontend: Hamburger menu button (data-testid='header-menu-btn') visible on Home, Chat, Schemes, Profile pages
Frontend: Sidebar panel (data-testid='sidebar-panel') opens when hamburger clicked
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard link (data-testid='sidebar-analytics-link') points to https://app.agnost.ai
Frontend: Analytics link opens in new tab (target='_blank')
Frontend: Green active badge (data-testid='analytics-active-badge') shown when analytics enabled
Frontend: Sidebar close button (data-testid='sidebar-close-btn') closes sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Agnost SDK properly initialized with AGNOST_WRITE_KEY from .env
All three tool calls (search_schemes, eligibility_matcher, generate_pdf) wrapped with agnost.track()
Proper error handling in place - agnost.shutdown() called on app shutdown
Sidebar component correctly fetches /api/analytics/status and displays green badge when enabled

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all sidebar and hamburger menu tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Agnost AI SDK v0.1.13 integration complete. Backend tracks all tool calls (search, eligibility, pdf) with agnost.track(). Frontend sidebar drawer accessible via hamburger menu on all pages with Analytics Dashboard link to https://app.agnost.ai. Green active badge indicates tracking is active. Auth uses mock OTP '1234'. Server logs show 'New conversation created' for agnost sessions.
